title: Green Thumb Industries Inc (GTBIF) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript Highlights
text: Green Thumb Industries' Q1 2024 earnings call provided detailed insights into the company's robust growth and strategic expansion. The company demonstrated strong operational performance with revenue of $276 million, exceeding analyst estimates. Net income of $31 million translated to earnings per share of 13 cents, substantially exceeding the 4-cent estimate. The company's adjusted EBITDA approached $90 million with consistent margins. Management highlighted the company's ability to grow revenue while managing costs effectively. The company's retail footprint expanded with new store openings planned throughout 2024. Management discussed the company's brand portfolio strength, which supported pricing power in certain segments. Cash flow from operations exceeded $80 million in the quarter, supporting the company's ability to fund growth and capital returns. The company's geographically diversified footprint across 14 states provides stability and growth opportunities. Management expressed confidence in continued revenue and earnings growth throughout 2024.
